query: Crawl this 3,000-page documentation site with Firecrawl v2 and retain job status plus failed URLs.
Map every product and pricing URL on this site before we choose a scrape set.
請用 Firecrawl v2 批次擷取網站，依 JSON schema 輸出產品資料與來源網址。
Set up a repeatable bulk scrape for JavaScript-rendered pages with structured results stored on disk.
Look up today's exchange rate and cite an authoritative current source.
Read this one public documentation page and summarize the relevant section.
Summarize the TypeScript types already present in this local repository.
OCR this scanned PDF and return structured JSON per page.
